question: Will the S&P 500 be above 6924.9999 on Apr 10, 2026 at 4pm EDT?
reasoning: The S&P 500 is currently around 6,785-6,827, needing a 1.4-2.0% gain in one day to reach 6925. While geopolitical tensions persist with the fragile Iran ceasefire and oil above $100, the market has shown strong momentum with a 2.5% rally on Wednesday. Technical resistance exists at these levels, but the current volatility environment makes a 1.4-2% move within normal daily ranges. The 4% market price severely undervalues this probability.
key_factors: Current S&P 500 level around 6,785-6,827 vs target of 6925
Only needs 1.4-2.0% gain in one trading day
Recent strong momentum with 2.5% Wednesday rally
Ongoing geopolitical volatility creating large daily moves
Market has shown ability to move 2%+ in single sessions recently
risks: Fragile Iran ceasefire could collapse causing market selloff
